events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen track featuring his incredible guitar work?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: The legendary Sir Mick Jagger hits 83 today! Still got the moves and the voice. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever when it launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, propelling them to Britpop stardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Which track from their debut still sounds absolutely biblical to you?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since the mud, music, and magic of Woodstock. What a lineup and what a moment in history! Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years since Elvis Presley left the building for the last time. His music truly lives forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' – an absolute masterpiece. What's your favourite track from their final recorded album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders' frontwoman still rocks harder than most. What's your favourite song from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's Birthday
angles.copy: Alright, biblical! Happy 54th birthday to Liam Gallagher. What's your top tune from the main man himself?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in October 1975 to coincide with his 'Shaved Fish' compilation album.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released as a UK single. A timeless message that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: First iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple introduced the very first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the original iPod? It was launched 25 years ago today, changing how we listen to music forever! Did you have one of the first models?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the very first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the life and legacy of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring impact of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
